title: 'In the NFL and bowing out' — Oct 12 2021 (transcript noise)
html:
1:11 voice memo from Oct 12 2021 (osu sophomore-ish window). Whisper output is partly hallucinated — opens with a nonsensical "I'm in the NFL and I'm bowing out" then drifts into a mostly-coherent confession about beef with dad over alcoholism, an explosion-of-violence moment, his mom defending the dad, and "my best friend being met me." Likely a real reflection but the transcript is unreliable; preserved as a node tagged for re-transcription. The alcoholism in the family / violence as only effective tool threads are clearly the subject.

dad yahir · mom yahir · alcoholism in the family · violence as only effective tool · osu · grants pass teen era · recording as note

related.label: Violence as the Only Effective Tool
